signals.raw:
Cavaliers Win Game 2 vs Raptors 115-105, Take 2-0 Lead in Eastern Conference First-Round Series | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 on April 21, 2026, securing a 2-0 series lead with standout performances from Donovan Mitchell (30 points, 7 rebounds, 5 assists), James Harden (28 points), and Evan Mobley (25 points, 8 rebounds).[1][2][3
